channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bronny James begins his Lakers career with a preseason debut. LeBron won't join until the next game
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — Bronny James played in his first NBA preseason game Friday night, but LeBron James wasn't in uniform with him when the Lakers hosted Minnesota in the first of Los Angeles' two weekend games in the Coachella Valley.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dillon Gabriel, Jordan James lead No. 6 Oregon to 31-10 victory over Michigan State
item.description: Dillon Gabriel threw a pair of touchdown passes and ran for another to help No. 6 Oregon remain undefeated with a 31-10 victory over Michigan State on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Anne M. Peterson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Businessman convicted of cheating ex-NBA star Dwight Howard out of millions in scam to buy WNBA team
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A Georgia businessman was convicted Friday of scamming former NBA star Dwight Howard out of millions of dollars in a bogus scheme to buy the WNBA's Atlanta Dream. The jury returned its verdict against Calvin Darden Jr. on Friday afternoon after a trial in New York City.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jemele Hill rips 'irresponsible headlines' on Caitlin Clark's WNBA ratings impact before proving their point
item.description: Ex-ESPN anchor Jemele Hill ripped "irresponsible headlines" about Caitlin Clark's impact on WNBA ratings before eventually acknowledging the point.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers bracing for record heat Sunday at Levi’s Stadium vs. Cardinals
item.description: The 49ers are already seeking relief for players and fans ahead of Sunday's game at Levi’s Stadium, where the kickoff temperature could eclipse 90 degrees for the first time at a game.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Bowles says the Buccaneers will learn from their mistakes in overtime loss to division-rival Falcons
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have no one to blame but themselves for failing to take advantage of an opportunity to tighten their grip on first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Davante Adams posts cryptic message of famed American poet amid trade speculation
item.description: As trade rumors swirl, Davante Adams posted a photo of poet Edgar Allan Poe on his Instagram story, perhaps best known for his writing of "The Raven.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mets play broadcaster's viral call of Pete Alonso's home run on plane, give him standing ovation
item.description: Legendary Mets broadcaster Howie Rose had perhaps the best call of his career Thursday. When the team played it on the plane, players game him a standing ovation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mailbag: The Pac-12 and Mountain West merger that wasn’t, media rights options, the basketball factor, Gonzaga’s impact and more
item.description: A reverse merger, which would have put 14 schools under the Pac-12 banner, encountered several hurdles.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Frequent flyer: Justin Jefferson embraces international spotlight as Vikings return to London
item.description: LONDON (AP) — He played soccer with Vinícius Júnior in Brazil and walked the runway with pal Joe Burrow in Paris. Now, he’s bringing the Griddy back to London. In other words, Justin Jefferson is right at home.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top-ranked Sinner 'very confident' despite WADA appealing his doping case
item.description: SHANGHAI (AP) — Top-ranked tennis player Jannik Sinner is “very confident” he will avoid a doping ban after the World Anti-Doping Agency appealed a decision to clear him of wrongdoing following two positive drug tests.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ninth-inning collapse makes Brewers' latest playoff exit particularly painful
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Willy Adames had just finished playing perhaps his final game with the Milwaukee Brewers when he described the most devastating of this franchise’s growing collection of playoff defeats.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Amid Hurricane Helene's destruction, sports organizations launch relief efforts to aid storm victims
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — N.C. State football player Davin Vann was on the move, tiptoeing his way between obstacles in the Wolfpack's indoor practice facility midway through a game week. And it had nothing to do with the upcoming visit from Wake Forest.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alonso's night turns around with season-saving homer for Mets in 9th inning
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Pete Alonso was having a rather disappointing evening in what could have been his final game for the New York Mets. Then everything changed with one swing of the bat.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Ewing returns to the New York Knicks in the new role of basketball ambassador
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Hall of Famer Patrick Ewing is returning to the New York Knicks in the newly created position of basketball ambassador. The Knicks said Friday that Ewing would assist both basketball and business operations in his role. Taken by the Knicks with the No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here's where SoFi ranks among NFL's best (and worst) stadiums
item.description: SoFi Stadium in Inglewood is not the best stadium in the NFL but it did crack the top five, according to a survey released Thursday. Lumen Field, the home of the Seattle Seahawks, was named the best stadium for football fans to visit in USA Today's rankings of all NFL stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Leading in a new league: Oceanside golfer wins top spot in nine matches
item.description: “Medalist of the match is basically between the two teams, the individual who has the lowest score,” explained Oceanside High School golfer Kassidy Stevens.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Mets advance in playoffs with 4-2 win over Brewers
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Pete Alonso hit a go-ahead, three-run homer off All-Star closer Devin Williams in the ninth inning and the New York Mets beat the Milwaukee Brewers 4-2 on Thursday night to win their NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Grand Junction softball pours it on Palisade for big league win
item.description: With a clear blue sky and beautiful Mt. Garfield as the backdrop at Palisade High School, it was the Grand Junction Tigers show on the softball field.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Yankees playoff tickets cost more in Kansas City than the Bronx
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) --- So, not everything is more expensive in New York City. Yankees fans will shell out less cash for a seat at Yankees Stadium than Kauffman Stadium in Kansas City when the American League Division Series kicks off Saturday at Yankee Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Mira Wassef, PIX 11

item.title: WFLA's Bucified Bert featured in Amazon Prime show with Bucs' QB Baker Mayfield
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are set to face off against the Atlanta Falcons during Thursday Night Football, streaming live tonight on Amazon's Prime Video.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake plays Minnesota to scoreless draw
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring eight goals in its last three games, Real Salt Lake was unable to find the back of the net in a scoreless draw with Minnesota Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL looks to solidify playoff seeding against Minnesota
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has already clinched an MLS playoff spot, but considering RSL is 6-1-2 all-time at home in the postseason, they want that home field advantage in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs prep for Falcons in Primetime TNF after big win over Eagles
item.description: After beating the Philadelphia Eagles the Tampa Bay Buccaneers now lead the NFC South with a 3-1 record.
item.dc:creator: C.H., WFLA, NBC

item.title: White Sox wrap up record-breaking losing season with 9-5 win over playoff-bound Tigers
item.description: Lenyn Sosa hit a three-run homer in the third inning to give the record-breaking Chicago White Sox a five-run lead as they went on to beat the playoff-bound Detroit Tigers 9-5 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kyle Hendricks sharp in what may have been Cubs' finale, 3-0 win over Reds
item.description: Kyle Hendricks waved to appreciative fans after what may have been his final start for the Cubs, and Chicago beat the Cincinnati Reds 3-0 on Saturday as Isaac Paredes and Pete Crow-Armstrong had run-scoring singles in a three-run eighth inning.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
